zh.lifeSummary: 當William Folcard於1428年出生在英國諾福爾可可洛斯特維其可時，他的父親John Brosyard Folcard III22歲，母親Joan De Sparham19歲。他於1445年之前與Joan Dodington在英國英格蘭諾福爾可可洛斯特維其可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1480年在英國諾福爾可享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Folcard于1428年出生在英国諾福爾可可洛斯特維其可时，他的父亲John Brosyard Folcard III22岁，母亲Joan De Sparham19岁。他于1445年之前与Joan Dodington在英国英格兰諾福爾可可洛斯特維其可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1480年在英国諾福爾可享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: Folcard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: French: relationship name French Foucquart, from the Old French personal name Foucard (Continental Germanic Fulchard). Compare Folkard .

variants.name: Folkard
meanings: 1 Norman, English: relationship name from the Middle English (Old French) personal name Folcard, Foucard, Focard (Continental Germanic Fulchard). Compare Fulcher , with which this name may sometimes have been confused. See also Flucker .
2 Norman, English: relationship name perhaps also partly from the Continental Germanic personal name Fulchered, which had some currency in E Anglia in the medieval period.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When William Folcard was born in 1428, in Crostwick, Norfolk, England, his father, John Brosyard Folcard III, was 22 and his mother, Joan De Sparham, was 19. He married Joan Dodington before 1445, in Crostwick, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died about 1480, in Norfolk, England, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Folcard est né en 1428, à Crostwick, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, John Brosyard Folcard III, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Joan De Sparham, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Joan Dodington avant 1445, à Crostwick, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé environ 1480, à Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Folcard 1428 in Crostwick, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Brosyard Folcard III 22 und seine Mutter Joan De Sparham 19. Er hat vor 1445 in Crostwick, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Joan Dodington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb um 1480 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Norfolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Folcard è nato il nel 1428 nel Crostwick, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, John Brosyard Folcard III, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Joan De Sparham, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Joan Dodington prima del 1445, nel Crostwick, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1480, nel Norfolk, England, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Folcardが1428年にイギリスノーフォルククロストウィックで生まれた時，父John Brosyard Folcard IIIは22歳，母Joan De Sparhamは19歳であった。1445年以前にイギリスイギリスノーフォルククロストウィックでJoan Dodingtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は約1480年にイギリスノーフォルクで53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Folcard(이)가 1428년 영국 노르폴크 크로스트윅에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Brosyard Folcard III(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan De Sparham(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1445년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 크로스트윅에서 Joan Dodington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1480년 영국 노르폴크에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Joan Dodington antes 1445, em Crostwick, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1480, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Folcard родился в 1428 г. в местности кроствикк, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени John Brosyard Folcard III было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Joan De Sparham, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Dodington перед 1445 г. в местности кроствикк, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер около 1480 г. в местности норфолк, Англия в возрасте 53 лет.
